name: YouTube Subscribe Lower Third
description: Transparent lower third with channel avatar, name, subscriber count and animated subscribe button

LowerThird.code: function LowerThird(props) { var frame = props.frame || 0; var fps = props.fps || 30; var channelName = props.channelName || ''; var subscriberCount = props.subscriberCount || ''; var avatarUrl = props.avatarUrl || ''; var videoTitle = props.videoTitle || ''; var slideInEnd = Math.round(fps * 0.6); var fadeOutStart = Math.round(fps * 4.5); var fadeOutEnd = Math.round(fps * 5.2); var slideY = 0; var opacity = 1; if (frame < 0) { slideY = 200; opacity = 0; } else if (frame < slideInEnd) { var t = frame / slideInEnd; var e = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3); slideY = 200 * (1 - e); opacity = e; } else if (frame < fadeOutStart) { slideY = 0; opacity = 1; } else if (frame < fadeOutEnd) { var ft = (frame - fadeOutStart) / (fadeOutEnd - fadeOutStart); opacity = 1 - ft * ft; } else { opacity = 0; } var pressFrame = Math.round(fps * 2.8); var releaseFrame = pressFrame + Math.round(fps * 0.15); var settleFrame = releaseFrame + Math.round(fps * 0.5); var btnScale = 1; var btnLabel = 'Subscribe'; var btnBg = '#0f0f0f'; var btnText = '#fff'; var btnBorder = 'transparent'; if (frame < pressFrame) { btnScale = 1; } else if (frame < releaseFrame) { var pt = (frame - pressFrame) / (releaseFrame - pressFrame); btnScale = 1 - 0.08 * (1 - Math.pow(1 - pt, 3)); btnBg = '#263850'; } else if (frame < settleFrame) { var rt = (frame - releaseFrame) / (settleFrame - releaseFrame); var w = 16.5; var z = 0.6; var exp = Math.exp(-z * w * rt); var wd = w * Math.sqrt(1 - z * z); var sp = 1 - exp * (Math.cos(wd * rt) + (z / Math.sqrt(1 - z * z)) * Math.sin(wd * rt)); btnScale = 0.92 + 0.08 * sp; btnLabel = 'Subscribed'; btnBg = '#f2f2f2'; btnText = '#0f0f0f'; btnBorder = '#d0d0d0'; } else { btnLabel = 'Subscribed'; btnBg = '#f2f2f2'; btnText = '#0f0f0f'; btnBorder = '#d0d0d0'; } var btn = React.createElement('div', { style: { width: 130, height: 36, borderRadius: 18, backgroundColor: btnBg, border: btnBorder !== 'transparent' ? '1px solid ' + btnBorder : 'none', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', transform: 'scale(' + btnScale + ')' } }, React.createElement('span', { style: { fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '500', color: btnText, fontFamily: 'Roboto, Arial, sans-serif', letterSpacing: '0.02em' } }, btnLabel)); var cardH = videoTitle ? 110 : 80; return React.createElement('div', { style: { width: 580, transform: 'translateY(' + slideY + 'px)', opacity: opacity } }, React.createElement('div', { style: { backgroundColor: '#ffffff', borderRadius: 12, padding: '12px 20px 12px 12px', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 12, boxShadow: '0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)', height: cardH } }, React.createElement('div', { style: { width: 56, height: 56, borderRadius: '50%', overflow: 'hidden', flexShrink: 0 } }, React.createElement('img', { src: avatarUrl, style: { width: '100%', height: '100%', objectFit: 'cover' } })), React.createElement('div', { style: { flex: 1, minWidth: 0 } }, React.createElement('div', { style: { fontSize: 16, fontWeight: '600', color: '#0f0f0f', fontFamily: 'Roboto, Arial, sans-serif', lineHeight: '1.3', whiteSpace: 'nowrap', overflow: 'hidden', textOverflow: 'ellipsis' } }, channelName), React.createElement('div', { style: { fontSize: 12, color: '#606060', fontFamily: 'Roboto, Arial, sans-serif', lineHeight: '1.4' } }, subscriberCount), videoTitle ? LowerThird.description: YouTube-style lower third with avatar, channel info, subscriber count, and animated subscribe button with spring bounce
